conservative.name: Transmutation of Lead
conservative.requirements:
5 power
Target metal item within close range

success.description: You transmute the target item into lead. The exact details of such a transmutation can vary, but in general it doubles the item's encumbrance value, reduces quality to poor. It reduces a weapon's Damage Rating by 1 or armor's Soak and Defence by 1 each. It also makes the item much more malleable and prone to damage

boon.description: You can transmute the item back to its original material as a manoeuvre
